headline: Everything you need to know before gifting.
description: Need a custom amount or company gifting support? Reach out and we can tailor it.

items.question: How long are gift cards valid?
items.answer: Gift cards are valid for 12 months from purchase date.

items.question: Can recipients use only part of the value?
items.answer: Yes. Remaining credit stays available for future purchases until expiry.

items.question: Can a gift card be used by someone else?
items.answer: Yes, gift cards are transferable unless purchased through a restricted corporate package.
